con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="ClaimsSoapService" targetNamespace="http://soap.insurance.example.com/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://soap.insurance.example.com/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://soap.insurance.example.com/" version="1.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="claim" type="tns:claim"/> <xs:element name="createClaim" type="tns:createClaim"/> <xs:element name="createClaimResponse" type="tns:createClaimResponse"/> <xs:element name="deleteClaim" type="tns:deleteClaim"/> <xs:element name="deleteClaimResponse" type="tns:deleteClaimResponse"/> <xs:element name="getAllClaims" type="tns:getAllClaims"/> <xs:element name="getAllClaimsResponse" type="tns:getAllClaimsResponse"/> <xs:element name="getClaimById" type="tns:getClaimById"/> <xs:element name="getClaimByIdResponse" type="tns:getClaimByIdResponse"/> <xs:element name="updateClaimStatus" type="tns:updateClaimStatus"/> <xs:element name="updateClaimStatusResponse" type="tns:updateClaimStatusResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="createClaim"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="policyNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="amount" type="xs:double"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="createClaimResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="claim" type="tns:claim"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="claim"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="amount" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="policyNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="status" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="deleteClaim"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="claimId" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="deleteClaimResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="deleted" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getAllClaims"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getAllClaimsResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="claims" type="tns:claim"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getClaimById"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="claimId" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="getClaimByIdResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="claim" type="tns:claim"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="updateClaimStatus"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="claimId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="status" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="updateClaimStatusResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="claim" type="tns:claim"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="getAllClaimsResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getAllClaimsResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="createClaim"> <wsdl:part element="tns:createClaim" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="deleteClaim"> <wsdl:part element="tns:deleteClaim" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="deleteClaimResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:deleteClaimResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getClaimById"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getClaimById" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="updateClaimStatus"> <wsdl:part element="tns:updateClaimStatus" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="createClaimResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:createClaimResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="updateClaimStatusResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:updateClaimStatusResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getClaimByIdResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getClaimByIdResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="getAllClaims"> <wsdl:part element="tns:getAllClaims" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="ClaimsSoapService"> <wsdl:operation name="createClaim"> <wsdl:input message="tns:createClaim" name="createClaim"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:createClaimResponse" name="createClaimResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="deleteClaim"> <wsdl:input message="tns:deleteClaim" name="deleteClaim"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:deleteClaimResponse" name="deleteClaimResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getAllClaims"> <wsdl:input message="tns:getAllClaims" name="getAllClaims"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:getAllClaimsResponse" name="getAllClaimsResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getClaimById"> <wsdl:input message="tns:getClaimById" name="getClaimById"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:getClaimByIdResponse" name="getClaimByIdResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="updateClaimStatus"> <wsdl:input message="tns:updateClaimStatus" name="updateClaimStatus"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:updateClaimStatusResponse" name="updateClaimStatusResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="ClaimsSoapServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:ClaimsSoapService"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="createClaim"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="createClaim"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="createClaimResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="deleteClaim"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="deleteClaim"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="deleteClaimResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getAllClaims"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="getAllClaims"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="getAllClaimsResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="getClaimById"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="getClaimById"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="getClaimByIdResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="updateClaimStatus"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="updateClaimStatus"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="updateClaimStatusResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="ClaimsSoapService"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:ClaimsSoapServiceSoapBinding" name="ClaimsSoapServicePort"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:9080/insurance-health-component/ClaimsSoapService"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
